notes: Thin bridge file (334 lines, 19 decls) wrapping W.toAffine as a SmoothPlaneCurve to re-export ordAtInfty facts for x_gen, y_gen, Phi_ff, PsiSq_ff, and mulByInt_x. The two longest proofs are the unconditional inseparable pole bounds for mulByInt_x (ordAtInfty_mulByInt_x_neg and exists_ordAtInfty_mulByInt_x_eq_even_le_neg_two), added to handle the p|r pencil regime. No sorries, no set_option maxHeartbeats; heavy use of WithTop Z cast arithmetic via push_cast/rfl.
